# Open TechStack

> Interactive visual guides to 280+ modern technologies across frontend, backend, AI/ML, DevOps, mobile, and AI coding for 2026.

Open TechStack is a free, open-source resource that helps developers compare and choose the right tech stack. Each guide features interactive SVG mind maps, stage-based filtering (Hobby/MVP/Growth/Scale), full-text search, and decision cheat sheets.

## Guides

- [Home](https://opentechstack.stitchwebsite.com/): Landing page with overview of all guides and stats.
- [Frontend Stacks](https://opentechstack.stitchwebsite.com/Frontend-Stacks-Visual-Guide.html): 60+ frontend technologies — React, Vue, Svelte, Solid, Angular, Next.js, Nuxt, Astro, SvelteKit, Tailwind, shadcn/ui, Zustand, TanStack Query, tRPC, Vite, Vitest, Playwright.
- [Backend Stacks](https://opentechstack.stitchwebsite.com/Backend-Stacks-Visual-Guide.html): 50+ backend technologies — Node.js, Python/Django/FastAPI, Go, Rust, Rails, Elixir, Supabase, Firebase, Postgres, Neon, Clerk, Auth0, Stripe, Inngest, Temporal, Sentry.
- [AI/ML Stacks](https://opentechstack.stitchwebsite.com/AIML-Stacks-Visual-Guide.html): 45+ AI/ML technologies — OpenAI, Claude, Gemini, Llama, LangChain, LlamaIndex, Pinecone, Qdrant, pgvector, CrewAI, vLLM, Modal, Hugging Face, LangSmith.
- [DevOps Stacks](https://opentechstack.stitchwebsite.com/DevOps-Stacks-Visual-Guide.html): 46+ DevOps technologies — GitHub Actions, Terraform, Docker, Kubernetes, AWS, GCP, Azure, Grafana, Datadog, Vault, ArgoCD, Helm, Backstage.
- [Mobile Stacks](https://opentechstack.stitchwebsite.com/Mobile-Stacks-Visual-Guide.html): 46+ mobile technologies — React Native, Expo, Flutter, SwiftUI, Jetpack Compose, KMP, NativeWind, Detox, Fastlane, Firebase.
- [Stack Combos](https://opentechstack.stitchwebsite.com/Stack-Combos.html): 12 pre-built full-stack recipes — Indie Hacker, AI Startup, SaaS Rocket, Enterprise Fortress, Realtime Machine, Content Empire, Mobile-First, E-commerce, Budget Warrior, TypeScript Purist, Data Platform, Open Source Stack.
- [AI Coding Tools](https://opentechstack.stitchwebsite.com/AI-Coding-Tools-Visual-Guide.html): 80+ AI coding tools — Cursor, Copilot, Windsurf, Claude Code, OpenAI Codex, Gemini CLI, v0, Bolt, Lovable, Devin, Kiro, CodeRabbit, Codacy, MCP servers, LLM Ops.
- [Stack Picker Wizard](https://opentechstack.stitchwebsite.com/stack-picker.html): Interactive 5-question quiz that recommends a full tech stack based on project type, team size, experience, budget, and priorities.

## Comparisons
- [Comparisons Hub](https://opentechstack.stitchwebsite.com/compare/): All head-to-head comparison pages.
- [Cursor vs Copilot vs Windsurf](https://opentechstack.stitchwebsite.com/compare/cursor-vs-copilot-vs-windsurf.html)
- [Claude Code vs Codex vs Gemini CLI](https://opentechstack.stitchwebsite.com/compare/claude-code-vs-codex-vs-gemini-cli.html)
- [Next.js vs Remix vs Astro](https://opentechstack.stitchwebsite.com/compare/nextjs-vs-remix-vs-astro.html)
- [React vs Vue vs Svelte](https://opentechstack.stitchwebsite.com/compare/react-vs-vue-vs-svelte.html)
- [Supabase vs Firebase](https://opentechstack.stitchwebsite.com/compare/supabase-vs-firebase.html)
- [Tailwind vs CSS Modules vs Vanilla Extract](https://opentechstack.stitchwebsite.com/compare/tailwind-vs-css-modules.html)
- [Zustand vs Redux Toolkit vs Jotai](https://opentechstack.stitchwebsite.com/compare/zustand-vs-redux.html)
- [Clerk vs Auth0 vs Supabase Auth](https://opentechstack.stitchwebsite.com/compare/clerk-vs-auth0.html)
- [Vercel vs Cloudflare Pages vs Netlify](https://opentechstack.stitchwebsite.com/compare/vercel-vs-cloudflare-vs-netlify.html)
- [Docker vs Podman vs Kubernetes](https://opentechstack.stitchwebsite.com/compare/docker-vs-podman-vs-kubernetes.html)
- [LangChain vs LlamaIndex vs Haystack](https://opentechstack.stitchwebsite.com/compare/langchain-vs-llamaindex.html)

## Key Features
- Interactive SVG mind maps generated at runtime
- Filter by project stage: Hobby ($0), MVP ($25-60), Growth ($50-500), Scale ($500+)
- Filter by: free tier, self-hostable, production-proven, TypeScript-first
- Full-text search across all technologies
- Decision cheat sheets with quick picks by constraints
- Keyboard shortcuts: `/` to search, `1-4` for stages, `Esc` to reset
- Zero dependencies: pure HTML + Tailwind CSS CDN + vanilla JavaScript

## Technology Coverage
Over 200 technologies across 50+ categories including: UI frameworks, meta-frameworks, styling, state management, data fetching, forms, build tools, testing, UI component libraries, hosting, languages/runtimes, BaaS, databases, authentication, background jobs, file storage, payments, email, observability, LLM providers, orchestration frameworks, vector databases, embeddings, RAG, AI agents, fine-tuning, evaluation, inference infrastructure, data labeling, CI/CD, infrastructure as code, containers, cloud platforms, monitoring, security, networking, GitOps, container registries, platform engineering, cross-platform frameworks, native development, mobile UI, navigation, mobile state management, mobile testing, build/deploy, push notifications, and design tools.

## Source Code
GitHub: https://github.com/JagadeepPortfolio/awesome-vibecoding-techstacks
